description: Create a 'visual echo' or 'speed trail' effect for the running character in the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The final animation must feature a second layer offset by 4 frames behind the original with 50% opacity, creating a semi-transparent ghost of the character's previous pose. Render the sequence as PNG frames to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/echo_effect/'.
